titleStmt.title: SII 39.86: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 86. (A.R. No. 86 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST AND SOUTH WALL ON THE SAME WALL MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN KULASĒKHARADĒVA, ‘WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE ALL COUNTRIES’-15TH+1st = 16TH YEAR (1284 A.D.)

summary.p: Damaged. This Inscription registers a public sale of the village Nāṭṭanēri to the temple, by the ūrār of Vīraiyāchchilai under conditions similar to those mentioned in No. 81 above. The old documents connected with the land are said to have been deposited in the temple. Further, the document (ōlai) lucidly describes the shares of paddy among the functionaries like Ūr-kaṇakkar, kaṇmālar, Paṟaiyar of Vīrayāchchilai besides the supply of paddy as offerings to be made to the god and goddess. This document was written by Vayalagamuḍaiyār Uyyavandāṉ-uḻaguḍaiyāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṟkittikkumel śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5vatu Eti
rāmāṉṭaik kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu Apa titiyaiyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruve kānaṉāṭāṉa virutarā karavaḷanāṭṭu ṟa mutalikaḷum Aracu makkaḷil nāṭṭāṉ m potarāyarum coṇa nāṭṭāṉāna Irāciṅka nāṭāḻvārum viḷāvaṉ parimelaḻakiyāṉum Irācaṉ coṇṭaṉum Irācaṉ
piḷḷāṉum paramaṉperiyanāyaṉāṉa Aññūṟ �ṭṭuk kumāttakkuṭi Ūravarpakkal nāṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nāṭṭāneri koṇṭa nāḷmutal Iṉnāḷaṟu tiyāka le Eṟi Aṉupavittu Iṟuttup potu kaccite Eṅkaḷur ṟṟāmaiyāle nāṅkaḷum Alaiñcu Ikkuṭikkāṭu koṇṭa Aracumakkaḷum taḷarukaiyāle Iṉnāṭṭāḷurikku Eṅkaḷāl Iṟukka peṇṇā
teṉṟu munpu Ikkāṇi Uṭaiya kumāttakkuṭi Ūravarai Uṅkaḷ kāṇi niṅkaḷ kaikkoḷḷa veṇumeṉṟu vilaippramāṇam pokaṭap pukkaviṭattu Ivarkaḷ Eṅkaḷāllāṟṟā Ūri laip pramāṇam pokaṭa veṇṇātu Eṅkaḷur tevatāṉamāka Uṭaiya Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ūrañcāti Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟpiyaḷākil viṟṟu vilaipramāṇattaiyum nāya
ṉār śrī paṇṭārattile Oṭukkuṅkoḷeṉṟu collukaiyāle Aracu makkaḷum maṟamutalikaḷum viṟpataṟkicaintu Ūrañcāti Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak koḷviruḷḷiroveṉṟu palakālum muṟkūṟap piṟkūṟi Iṟpaṭiviṟkil koḷvo meṉṟa puṟamalaināṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟku Ūrañcāti Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkā
ṇiyāka vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu kumāttakkuṭi Ūravar pakkal koṇṭa nāṭṭāṉerikkup perunāṉ kellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai teṟku nokkippo peruvaḻikku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai nāṭṭupperayaṉ kuṭikkāṭṭil Irācaṉ coṇṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār kuṭitāṅki
vaṭavarampukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai ciṟṟalai vayalil Ilaṅkātāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār Oḷiyāraraṇāṉ vayakkalil kiḻvarampukkuk kiḻakkum Itaṉ vaṭakkuc ciṟṟalai vayalil vayalparippukku teṟkum Iṉnāṭṭāṉerik kuḷattukku nirellai Eṟina maṭṭam meṟuvatākavum Āka Icaiñca perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭa nirnilamum nañcey puñceyyum nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷamum peciṉa Ellaipparippum kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟum meṉokkiya maramu
m palamaramum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uḷnilamoḻiviṉṟi Inṉāṭṭāṉerikku Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷukku Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiya tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āti caṇṭeśvaratevaṟku Aracu makkaḷum maṟamutalikaḷum Ippaṭi viṟṟa nāṭṭāṉerikkukkaṭamai Aṉtārayam poṉvari viṉiyokam veṇṭukoḷ kaṟpūravilai kāriyavārāṭci cilvari peru
vari pañcupili caṉtuvikkiṟakam veṭṭip pāṭṭam muṭṭāvāḷ cevakam Eṟcoṟu kūṟṟarici maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟaiyum tevaiyum Ūṟkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu Ūrileeṟaṭṭu Iṟuttup pōtuvomākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Iṉnāṭṭāneri viṟṟu muṉpu vilaikoṇṭa mulacātanamum paṇṭārattile Oṭukki Ūrañcāti Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟu vilaippiṟamā
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟku Aracu makkaḷum maṟamutalikaḷum Ippaṭi viṟṟa nāṭṭāṉerikku Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ vilaiyāvaṇakkaḷatte kāṭṭiyeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟak koṇṭu Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Innāṭṭāṉeri viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Ituve vilaiyolaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuṇmāvaṟutip poruṭcelavo
lai kāṇavum kāṭṭavum kaṭavatallavākavum Ivvolaikku Ōlaikkuṟṟam colkuṟṟam Eḻuttukkuṟṟam collakaṭava tallavākavum Ikkuṭikkāṭṭukku viraiyāccilaiyil nāyaṉāṟkum piṭāriyāṟkum tevar Arimukkaiy micukuṟuṇi Ūrkkaṇakkar Ōlaipeṟum kaṇmāḷarpēṟu paṟaiyarpeṟu viraiyāccilaip paṟṟiṟpeṟum peṟu Eṅkaḷurk kuṭimakkaḷ peṟuvārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi viṟṟa Inṉāṭṭā
ṉeri Ellai ceppit tiruccūlastāpaṉammum paṇṇi Iccātaṉappaṭiyile kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Aṉupavip
pārkaḷākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟu muṉpu Ikkuṭikkāṭu vilaikoṇṭa mulacātaṉamum paṇṭārattile Oṭukki Ūrañcāti Iṟaiyili tirunāmattukkā
ṇiyāka viṟṟu vilaippiṟamāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉāyanār Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟku viraiyāccile Aracu makkaḷum maṟamutalikaḷum Ippaṭikku Ivarka
ḷ colla Ippiṟamāṇam Eḻutineṉ Ivvūrkkaṇakku vayalakamuṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉ Ulakuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.86 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
